short_description: 171 is an open world action adventure game with a Brazilian inspired ambience.
detailed_description:
171 presents a vibrant city full of opportunities, allowing you to decide where to go and what to do in a broad environment inspired by typically Brazilian scenarios. Every detail and element in the setting have been carefully designed to provide a sense of familiarity to the player.

Regular Updates as the Final Version of the Game is Completed

More than 20 updates have already been carried out, each bringing new features and/or improvements to the game. While waiting for the development to be completed, you can enjoy regular updates that further enhance your gaming experience. In some of our recent updates, new features have been added, optimizations implemented, and themed updates released, such as Christmas and June party themes. We also expanded the number of vehicles, weapons, and clothing, and offered the possibility to customize motorcycles and weapons. Make sure to return regularly to participate in development by providing your valuable feedback.

A Captivating Setting

From humble neighborhoods to middle-class areas and regions with vegetation, all inspired by Brazilian cities, you will have the chance to explore a vibrant city full of honest and dishonest opportunities. Make your choices and carve your own path to conquer your space in this lively city!

NVIDIA DLSS and AMD FSR Support

Harness the power of NVIDIA Deep Learning Super Sampling (DLSS) and AMD FidelityFX Super Resolution (FSR) to improve your frame rate and enjoy even crisper graphics on Nvidia GPUs that support this technology.

Enhance your experience with Frame Generation! The frame generation feature offers significant benefits—boost your frame rate and enjoy sharper visuals on compatible Nvidia and AMD GPUs.

Partial Xbox Controller Support

Play your way! Now, you can perform incredible escapes using your controller, and the best part is that with every action executed in the game, your controller will vibrate accordingly.

Ultrawide and Superultrawide Technology Support

Expand your field of view even more and experience immersive gameplay with the use of ultrawide 21:9 and superultrawide 32:9.

Car and Motorcycle Customization

Driving a fast car is amazing, but customizing your vehicle with sound systems, wheels, and lowering it is even better. How about changing mirrors, colors, wheels, and adding a luggage rack to your motorcycle before parading through the city? If you prefer, you can also strip down your motorcycle and ride boldly through the city!

Weapon Customization

Don't be surprised to come across a white van performing suspicious services on the map. In it, you will have the opportunity to customize your firearms, making them even more powerful than they already are. Whether adding extended magazines, lasers, suppressors, or choosing an exceptional skin to display your style during confrontations.

Create Your Own Character

By now, you've probably noticed that you can customize your car, motorcycle, and even your weaponry. So, what are you waiting for to choose clothes and accessories and walk stylishly through the streets? Access the clothing store and choose from various types and models of clothes and accessories to customize the appearance of your character!

Forge Your Path and Make Your Choices

In a city full of possibilities, you can choose how to earn money to spend. You can opt to work honestly in different types of deliveries or give rides across the map. On the other hand, you can also choose a life of crime, undertaking dangerous tasks such as drug delivery, bill collection, or facing the city's factions. Conquer your space, take control of criminal operations, collect profits from the operation, and recruit other criminals to help you in new ventures. However, be careful, as the police forces are always vigilant to outlaw activities!

This is an Alpha version in early access intended for enthusiasts who want to enjoy the game casually or individuals interested in actively participating in development by providing valuable feedback on their experience. The current content may contain bugs, and the mechanics present in the game may be subject to instability or temporarily disabled for necessary polishing. The current content does not represent the final quality of the game, and the same should be modified and/or enabled in later versions.

supported_languages:
Portuguese - Brazil*, English, Spanish - Latin America, French, Italian, German, Russian, Turkish, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
